description: Family letter from Sālim to Bū Manṣūr b. Sukkarī (or Zikrī?) in Alexandria reporting that the Rūmī cheese had arrived and that the writer had sent the desired ceramics (fukhkhār). Greetings to Mother and both grandparents. The address is in Arabic script on verso. Information from Goitein's note card.
description_he: מכתב משפחתי מסאלם לאבו מנצור בן סוכרי באלכסנדריה, מדווח על גבינת רומי וכלי חרס שנשלחו.
